name: Whole Milk
reason: Whole milk is a natural dairy product rich in protein, calcium, and essential fat-soluble vitamins like A and D. It provides a complete source of nutrition that supports bone health, muscle development, and overall physical growth. Classified as beneficial as it is a minimally processed, nutrient-dense whole food.

name: milk fat
reason: Milk fat is the natural fat component of dairy, containing essential fatty acids and fat-soluble vitamins like A, D, and K. It serves as an efficient energy source and supports various cellular and metabolic functions in the body. Classified as beneficial as it is a natural part of a whole-food nutritional profile.
